title: YOURLS
description: Your Own URL Shortener: a small, self-hosted PHP service to run your own short-link service with stats, plugins, and a developer API.
installation: YOURLS only supports MySQL/MariaDB (no PostgreSQL), so this template ships the mariadb add-on. The admin account is bootstrapped from YOURLS_USER / YOURLS_PASS on first boot, and YOURLS_SITE is bound to the deploy URL via {{KUBERO_APP_URL}} (must be the exact public URL, no trailing slash). The admin UI lives at /admin/. Before going to production, rotate the MariaDB password, the YOURLS_PASS admin password, and the YOURLS_COOKIEKEY (openssl rand -hex 32). User-supplied plugins, custom pages, and language packs persist on the mounted volume at /var/www/html/user.
